other_observers: My wife, Beth; I found the bird.
description: Gray crown, and cheek patch. Yellow supercillium. Yellow through - extending up on side of neck and down onto lower side.   Streaked gray lines down the underside from neck down onto belly.   I did not get a good look at the upper side. There was a small wing bar in upper wing.Behaviors: In a mixed flock - several yellow-rumps around - lots of migrants were in the general area (Thrushes, empids, sparrows, etc.).  Actively feedingCall: silentPlumage: Adult
